questionHtml: Show that the average rate at which the gravitational potential energy of the water decreases is 2.5 GW.
markschemeHtml:
mass per second leaving dam is 1.2 × 10 5 60  × 103 = «2.0 × 106 kg s–1»

rate of decrease of GPE is = 2.0 × 106 × 9.81 × 127

= 2.49 × 109 «W» /2.49 «GW»

 

Do not award ECF for the use of 110 m or 144 m

Allow 2.4 GW if rounded value used from (a)(i) or 2.6 GW if g = 10 is used

[3 marks]

meta.title: Show that the average rate at which the gravitational potential energy of the water decreases is 2.5 GW.
